action_set_definitions.name: search_network_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for network components by name/identifier to retrieve unique IDs and metadata. Used to isolate 'PC5-Segment-C-FiberPair-2' from decommissioned or experimental links.

search_query.description: The name of the link or node.

action_set_definitions.name: get_link_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current capacity (Gbps), utilization, and a list of currently installed hardware modules on a specific fiber link.

link_id.description: The unique identifier of the fiber link.

action_set_definitions.name: get_facility_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the power limit and current power consumption for a specific facility (node).

node_id.description: The unique identifier of the node.

action_set_definitions.name: run_optical_diagnostic
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a sweep of the fiber pair to establish the baseline link budget, specifically the post-repair aging margin (Q-factor).

link_id.description: The unique identifier of the link.

action_set_definitions.name: get_upgrade_catalog
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of available 400G and 800G hardware modules with their unit costs, power draw, and capacity specs.

action_set_definitions.name: get_financial_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the remaining CAPEX budget for the network upgrade project.

action_set_definitions.name: decommission_network_hardware
action_set_definitions.description: Removes existing hardware modules from a link to reclaim power and rack space.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_capacity_provisioning
action_set_definitions.description: Installs new capacity modules on a specific link.

state_description.nodes: List of active network nodes (routers/switches) and their operational status.
state_description.links: List of physical or logical connections between nodes, including capacity (Gbps) and current utilization.
state_description.traffic_demand_matrix: Current traffic requirements between node pairs (Source-Destination pairs and required Mbps).
state_description.available_budget: Remaining capital expenditure (CAPEX) available for network upgrades or additions.
state_description.network_metrics: Global performance indicators such as average latency, packet loss rate, and congestion score.
